headline: Franklin Resources, Inc. Announces Preliminary Month-End Assets Under Management
summary: SAN MATEO, Calif., June 03, 2026--Franklin Resources, Inc. (Franklin Templeton) (NYSE: BEN) today reported preliminary month-end assets under management (AUM) of $1.78 trillion at May 31, 2026, compared to $1.75 trillion at April 30, 2026. This month’s increase in preliminary AUM reflected the positive impact of markets and long-term net inflows of $4 billion, inclusive of $1 billion of long-term net inflows at Western Asset Management1.

headline: Franklin Resources Accelerates Tokenized Finance Push With MoonPay
summary: BEN, through its Franklin Templeton brand, teams with MoonPay to expand tokenized fund access and deepen its role in blockchain-based finance.
